It details the semi-finals (Kuai Man beating Shi Xunhao 3-1, Wang Yidi beating Chen Yi 3-1) and the final (Kuai Man beating Wang Yidi 3-1), concluding that Kuai Man locked the qualification. The provided image contains a news report with the headline "Kuai Man locks in London World Table Tennis Championships qualification" and sub-headline "Chinese Women's Team secondary selection competition concludes". The body text of the image explicitly confirms the match scores: "Semi-finals, Kuai Man and Wang Yidi both won with a score of 3-1, defeating Shi Xunhao and Chen Yi respectively... In the final, Kuai Man defeated Wang Yidi 3-1, locking in the fourth World Table Tennis Championships qualification spot." The date on the image is 2026-03-22, which aligns with the timeline in the text (March 21-22 matches). Therefore, the image strongly supports the factual claims in the news text.
